steps: Let the starting number of cupcakes be x. In the morning, she sells 2/5 of them, so she sells (2/5)x, leaving x - (2/5)x = (3/5)x. In the afternoon, she sells 1/3 of the remaining cupcakes, so she sells (1/3)*(3/5)x = (1/5)x. After the afternoon sale, the remaining cupcakes are (3/5)x - (1/5)x = (2/5)x. We are told this equals 24, so (2/5)x = 24. Multiply both sides by 5/2: x = 24 * (5/2) = 12 * 5 = 60. So she started with 60 cupcakes. Check: Morning: 60 * 2/5 = 24 sold, 36 left. Afternoon: 1/3 of 36 = 12 sold, 24 left. Correct.
